context: Evaluates the solution's correct use of both notes_list (returns NoteMeta without body) and note_get (returns full Note with body) commands, and its understanding that list operations omit the body for efficiency while individual retrieval includes the decrypted body.

checklist.name: notes_list for metadata-only list
checklist.description: The solution calls `notes_list(notebookId)` to obtain the lightweight `NoteMeta[]` array and does not attempt to access a `body` field on the result.

checklist.name: note_get for full note with body
checklist.description: The solution calls `note_get(id)` to retrieve the complete `Note` object and correctly reads the `body` field (Tiptap JSON) and `body_format` field.

checklist.name: body_format value
checklist.description: The solution correctly identifies or verifies that the `body_format` field equals `"tiptap-json"` for notes retrieved via `note_get`.

checklist.name: Type discrimination
checklist.description: The solution implements a type guard or check (e.g., `'body' in note`) to distinguish between `NoteMeta` and full `Note` objects.
